title: Kadhalika Lyrics Vedi Song Lyrics
singerName: Andrea Jeremiah, Emcee Jazz, Naresh Iyer
stanzas:
Singers: Emcee Jezz, Naresh Iyer, Andrea Jeremiah, Rap Vocals Sharmila
Lyrics: VaaliSong: Kadhalikka
MOvie: Vedi
Music : Vijay Antony

Common Girls, its time to play
Lets have fun in my own way
Put your hands up in the air and
push yourself, lets go somewhere
this is for people out there ...
pull your leg to have some fun
Lets laugh out loud and I'll be done

Kaadhalika pennoruthi paarthuvitaeney
En kangalukul un mugathai naathu natteyney
Yaaru indha yaaru indha aaraavaara poo
En sattayin mel kuthi vacha pattu roja poo..

Manmadhanin thaaimozhi naan,
Meesai illaa minmini naan
Thithithidum theekuchi naan,
Thendraluku thangachi naan  (Kaadhalika pennoruthi ..)

Common Girls, its time to play
Lets have fun in my own way
Put your hands up in the air and
push yourself, lets go somewhere
this is for people out there ...
pull your leg to have some fun
Lets laugh out loud and I'll be done

Naan oru vinmeenai kandaenadi, pagalil
Nee ivan kannukul kaithattinaai, Iravil
Koondhal veesi thoondil pottal,
Meesai yaavum meenaai maattum
Paambai pola paarvai paarthu
Aanin nenjai kothaadhey.

Veenai vegam yaanai thandham
neethaan endhan aadhi andham
Velli parkkal vairakkarkkal
ennai mendru thinnaadhey (Kaadhalika pennoruthi ..)

Yaar ival poo pootha boogambam pol azhaga
Naan ival veppathil vilundhenada melugaai
Pookal ellam ovvor vannam
Poove unnil 7-lu vannam
killi paarka kaigal neelum
Thalli thalli chellaadhey

vaanam vittu boomi vandha
Aedhen thoota angal neeyo
Paadhi kannaal paarthu nenjai
pathavachi kollaadhey (Kaadhalika pennoruthi ...)

Manmadhanin thaaimozhi naan,
Meesai illaa minmini naan
Thithithidum theekuchi naan,
Thendraluku thangachi naan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Kadhalika?

The song Kadhalika is an upbeat and energetic track that encourages listeners to have fun and enjoy life.

Who are the singers of Kadhalika?

The song is sung by Andrea Jeremiah, Emcee Jazz, and Naresh Iyer.

Who composed the music for the movie Vedi?

The music for Vedi was composed by Vijay Antony.

What role does the song play in the movie Vedi?

The song is a lively dance number that adds to the film's energetic and entertaining vibe.

When was the song Kadhalika released?

The song was released in the year 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kadhalika from the movie Vedi is a high-energy dance number that captures the essence of fun and celebration. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it sets the perfect mood for parties and joyous occasions. Sung by Andrea Jeremiah, Emcee Jazz, and Naresh Iyer, the track is a vibrant expression of living life to the fullest. The music, composed by Vijay Antony, complements the song's upbeat theme, making it a memorable addition to any festive playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Kadhalika from the movie Vedi, a vibrant track that brings together the dynamic vocals of Andrea Jeremiah, Emcee Jazz, and Naresh Iyer. With Vijay Antony's electrifying music and Vaali's catchy lyrics, this song is a perfect blend of energy and fun. Experience the ultimate party anthem that will make you want to hit the dance floor instantly!
stanzaMeanings: Common girls, it's time to play. Let's have fun in my own way. Put your hands up in the air and push yourself, let's go somewhere. This is for people out there... pull your leg to have some fun. Let's laugh out loud and I'll be done.
I saw a girl to love. I placed your face in my eyes. Who is this, who is this lively flower? A silk rose placed on my dress.
I am the mother tongue of Cupid, I am a moustache-less firefly. I am a sparking matchstick, I am the breeze's sister.

Common girls, it's time to play. Let's have fun in my own way. Put your hands up in the air and push yourself, let's go somewhere. This is for people out there... pull your leg to have some fun. Let's laugh out loud and I'll be done.
I saw a star during the day, you waved at me at night. You tossed your hair and caught me like a fish. Don't pierce a man's heart with your snake-like gaze.
You are the speed of a veena, the strength of an elephant, my beginning and end. Silver anklets, diamond bangles, don't eat me up.
Who is she, beautiful like a blooming flower? I fell for her warmth. All flowers have different colors, but you have seven colors. Don't move away, stay close.
Don't come down from the sky to the earth. Don't look at me with half your eyes and steal my heart.
I am the mother tongue of Cupid, I am a moustache-less firefly. I am a sparking matchstick, I am the breeze's sister.

Common girls, it's time to play. Let's have fun in my own way. Put your hands up in the air and push yourself, let's go somewhere. This is for people out there... pull your leg to have some fun. Let's laugh out loud and I'll be done.
